notes: 5-axis critic config. Mirrors content-engine. All Phase 7 ad creative is graded on these axes before reaching the user.

specificity.rule: Concrete numbers, names, places. Penalise vague claims.

voice_match.rule: Matches voice-fingerprint.json — sentence length, vocabulary, idiom cadence.

tension.rule: Surfaces a real before/after delta — not generic benefit copy.

hook_strength.rule: First 3 seconds / first line stops the scroll.

rules.rule: Never use em dashes (—). Use commas, full stops, or split sentences.
Never offer refunds, money-back guarantees, or satisfaction guarantees in any marketing copy.
Never mix personal finance, accounting, banking, tax, or bankruptcy content into marketing material.
Never promise a finished or running outcome (built, owned, complete). Use process language: walk through, hands-on install, set up together.
Never promise ongoing support, weekly Q&A, helpdesk, or post-purchase office hours unless that product literally ships with them.
Never invite casual drop-ins or free chats. No 'come say hi', 'drop in', 'stop by', 'swing past'.
Never invent venues, addresses, dates, prices, names, IDs, or contact info. If unverified, mark TBC and ask the owner.

firewalls.comment: Never silently strip. Always flag, rewrite, then re-grade.
